default.author: Sarah M. — Portland
default.quote: I've never had a piece of jewelry that felt so completely mine. The Riverbed Band looks like it grew on my finger — I haven't taken it off in three months.

default.author: Emi K. — San Francisco
default.quote: Lena's work has a weight and warmth that you just can't find in a store. I bought the Tether necklace as a gift and ended up ordering one for myself the same week.

default.author: David R. — Seattle
default.quote: The craftsmanship is extraordinary. You can feel the intention in every detail. This is jewelry made by someone who genuinely loves what they do.
